properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I make'em, I try to hide'em Sometimes it feels like I'm defined by them All of the evidence stacked against me All of the fingers that are pointed at me I can't deny it

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All of my mistakes Woven through my story All the mess I make God, use it for Your glory Every wrong turn, it's true Led me right here to You I may lose my way, nothing's greater than Your grace /: Not even my mistakes (Na na na) (Na na na na) :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I hunger to be holy But I still wrestle with the old me You know who I am, who I'm becoming Through all the dirt and the stains, you love me I can't deny it

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Every hard fall, back in yesterday Every stumble that I've yet to make The cross redeems, and washes them away Whoa And washes them away, oh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All of my mistakes Woven through my story (My story, oh) All the mess I make God, use it for Your glory (All for You, Lord) Every wrong turn, it's true Led me right here to You (You) I may lose my way, nothing's greater than Your grace (Oh)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All of my mistakes (My mistakes) Woven through my story (My story, Lord) All the mess I make God, use it for Your glory (Oh God, use it, Lord) Every wrong turn, it's true Led me right here to You (You) I may lose my way, nothing's greater than Your grace

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Not even my mistakes (No) Not even my mistakes Not even my mistakes (My mistakes) Not even my mistakes No, not even my mistakes
